seo.title: Create your personalized recipe book | Print & PDF
seo.description: Create, organize and print your recipes in an elegant book. Import your recipes by photo, customize your book and receive it at home.
seo.author: Nom de votre service

openGraph.title: Votre cuisine mérite son propre livre
openGraph.description: Transformez vos recettes en un livre élégant à imprimer ou partager.

twitter.title: Créez votre livre de recettes personnalisé
twitter.description: Organisez et imprimez vos recettes dans un livre unique.

hero.title: Your cooking deserves its own book.
hero.description: Save, organize and print your recipes in an elegant book, to share or to keep forever.

features.title: No time limits
features.desc: Enter your recipes manually or import them by taking a photo of your paper recipe.

features.title: Sleek and intuitive interface
features.desc: A smooth experience to manage your culinary library without effort.

features.title: Scan your paper recipes
features.desc: Take a photo, and our AI will transcribe the ingredients and steps for you.

features.title: Automatic layout
features.desc: All your recipes are automatically formatted for a beautiful, professional result.

features.title: Fast templates
features.desc: Predefined styles let you personalize the look with one click.

features.title: Order your book
features.desc: Simple, fast, and secure. Home delivery in 5 days.

pricing.title: 2 options to bring your book to life
pricing.description: Choose the simplicity of all-in-one or the independence of PDF export.

options.title: Turnkey option
options.desc: We take care of everything. Premium printing via our partners and delivery to your door.

options.title: PDF option (DIY)
options.desc: Buy the high-resolution PDF export of your book and print it yourself with your printer.

faq.title: All the answers to your questions.

items.q: How does OCR text recognition work?
items.a: Just take a photo of your paper recipe. Our technology automatically extracts the text.
Yes, you can share a secure link with your loved ones.

cta.title: Ready to create your recipe book?
cta.description: Join the cooking community and bring your culinary library to life.
